_comment: Copy to integrations.config.json (gitignored). Each provider needs a one-time OAuth app whose redirect/callback URL is exactly http://127.0.0.1:8723/callback . Then connecting is pure SSO, nothing to type.

gmail._where: console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials -> OAuth client. Add the redirect URI above and add your email as a Test user.

github._where: github.com/settings/developers -> New OAuth App. Authorization callback URL = the redirect URI above.

slack._where: api.slack.com/apps -> OAuth & Permissions. Add User Token Scopes + the redirect URI. NOTE: Slack may require an https redirect; if it rejects the loopback URL this provider needs a tunnel/custom-scheme (tracked).

jira._where: developer.atlassian.com/console/myapps -> OAuth 2.0 (3LO). Add Jira scopes + the callback URI above.

discord._where: discord.com/developers/applications -> OAuth2. Add the redirect URI above. (Connects your account; bot setup is separate.)
